CVE-2022-41727.title: An attacker can craft a malformed TIFF image which will consume a ...
CVE-2022-41727.summary: An attacker can craft a malformed TIFF image which will consume a significant amount of memory when passed to DecodeConfig. This could lead to a denial of service.

CVE-2023-29407.title: A maliciously-crafted image can cause excessive CPU consumption i ...
CVE-2023-29407.summary: A maliciously-crafted image can cause excessive CPU consumption in decoding. A tiled image with a height of 0 and a very large width can cause excessive CPU consumption, despite the image size (width * height) appearing to be zero.

CVE-2023-29408.title: The TIFF decoder does not place a limit on the size of compressed ...
CVE-2023-29408.summary: The TIFF decoder does not place a limit on the size of compressed tile data. A maliciously-crafted image can exploit this to cause a small image (both in terms of pixel width/height, and encoded size) to make the decoder decode large amounts of compressed data, consuming excessive memory and CPU.

CVE-2024-24792.title: Parsing a corrupt or malicious image with invalid color indices c ...
CVE-2024-24792.summary: Parsing a corrupt or malicious image with invalid color indices can cause a panic.
